questionHtml:
The diagram below shows a weighted graph.

Use Prim’s algorithms to find a minimal spanning tree, starting at J. Draw the tree, and find its total weight.
markschemeHtml:
(C4)

OR

           (C4)

Total weight = 17         (A2)

Note: There are other possible spanning trees.

[6 marks]
